targets.query: SELECT sum("rate") FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalOperations"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("rate") FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalBytesTransferred"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Server Group IOPS — Read vs Write

targets.query: SELECT sum("rate") AS "Reads" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("rate") AS "Writes" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Server Group Throughput — Read vs Write

targets.query: SELECT sum("rate") AS "Read" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalBytesRead"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT sum("rate") AS "Write" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalBytesWritten"), 1s) AS "rate" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("PercentAllocated") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name"
SELECT last("BytesAllocated") AS "Allocated" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name"
SELECT last("State") FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("CacheState") FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("PowerState") FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("CacheSize") FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter

SELECT 100 * (mean("rh") + mean("wh")) / (mean("rh") + mean("rm") + mean("wh") + mean("wm")) AS "Hit %" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("CacheReadHits"), 1s) AS "rh", non_negative_derivative(last("CacheReadMisses"), 1s) AS "rm", non_negative_derivative(last("CacheWriteHits"), 1s) AS "wh", non_negative_derivative(last("CacheWriteMisses"), 1s) AS "wm" FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)) WHERE "rh" + "rm" + "wh" + "wm" > 0 GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("TotalBytesMigrated") FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "Reads" FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "Writes" FROM "datacore_servers" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("lat") AS "Read" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReadTime"), 1s) / non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "lat" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "extendedcaption" =~ /on $server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("lat") AS "Write" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWriteTime"), 1s) / non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "lat" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "extendedcaption" =~ /on $server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("PoolStatus") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesTotal") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesAllocated") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesAvailable") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesOverSubscribed") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("PercentAllocated") FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesAllocatedPercentage") AS "Allocated" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesAvailablePercentage") AS "Available" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesReservedPercentage") AS "Reserved" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("BytesInReclamationPercentage") AS "In Reclamation" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "Reads" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "Writes" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("lat") AS "Read" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReadTime"), 1s) / non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "lat" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

SELECT mean("lat") AS "Write" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWriteTime"), 1s) / non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "lat" FROM "datacore_pools" WHERE "resource_name" =~ /^$pool$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT last("DiskStatus") FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("Size") FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("PercentAllocated") AS "Allocated" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter
SELECT 100 - last("PercentAllocated") AS "Available" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalOperations"), 1s) AS "Total" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalReads"), 1s) AS "Reads" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalWrites"), 1s) AS "Writes" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE "resource_name" = '$vdisk' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

list.name: server
list.label: DataCore Server
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "datacore_servers" WITH KEY = "resource_name"

list.name: pool
list.label: Disk Pool
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "datacore_pools" WITH KEY = "resource_name"

list.name: vdisk
list.label: Virtual Disk
list.query: SELECT "resource_name" FROM (SELECT top("iops", "resource_name", $top) FROM (SELECT sum("iops") AS "iops" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalOperations"), 1s) AS "iops" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY "resource_name"))
list.definition: SELECT "resource_name" FROM (SELECT top("iops", "resource_name", $top) FROM (SELECT sum("iops") AS "iops" FROM (SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("TotalOperations"), 1s) AS "iops" FROM "datacore_virtualdisks" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "resource_name", time($__interval) fill(null)) GROUP BY "resource_name"))
